title: meshtastic-security-audit: Passive security audit toolkit for Meshtastic packet captures
description: A Python toolkit that passively analyses Meshtastic packet captures (PCAP) and surfaces four classes of misconfiguration and information disclosure: use of the well-known default channel key, node-identifier enumeration across the observed mesh, unencrypted traffic on supposedly encrypted channels, and GPS coordinate leakage in position payloads. The toolkit consists of a Scapy-based parser for the Meshtastic frame structure on the LoRa link layer, four independent detectors, an HTML and JSON reporter, and a Click-based command-line interface. Synthetic Scapy-crafted packet fixtures underpin the test suite so no live RF capture is required for continuous integration.
